case_title: ALYCIA F WESTFALL VS. SPRINT COMMUNICATIONS COMPANY L.P.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY WESTFALL, ALYCIA F AS TO DEFENDANT SPRINT COMMUNICATIONS COMPANY L.P. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-09-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WESTFALL, ALYCIA F ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WESTFALL, ALYCIA F AS TO DEFENDANT SPRINT COMMUNICATIONS COMPANY L.P.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-24-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SPRINT COMMUNICATIONS COMPANY L.P.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
